class.name: JustAMCPResource
class.brief_description: Base abstraction layer scaling Native MCP Resources internally safely resolving custom URI matches globally.
class.description: Abstract template decoupling external MCP resource handlers directly from monolithic systems recursively routing string templates mapped over generic execution vectors iteratively securely via [method JustAMCPResourceExecutor.add_resource].

method.name: get_name
method.description: Safely identifies and maps custom schemas structurally routing human-readable descriptors mapping external bindings seamlessly.

method.name: get_schema
method.description: Generates the strict standard schema maps bounding the URL templates cleanly generating definitions implicitly!

method.name: get_uri
method.description: Returns the defined standard bindings effectively pointing to either explicit `uri` or dynamic `uriTemplate` strings effectively spanning the mappings gracefully safely!

method.name: is_template
method.description: Returns `true` dynamically specifying whether the resource maps wildcards inherently returning specific schemas matching definitions securely internally!

method.name: read_resource
method.description: Parses and loads the corresponding native string resolving paths dynamically returning standard byte strings mapping explicitly externally handling parsing!
